use_cases: Displaying sleep duration and quality metrics in health tracking apps
Visualizing sleep stages (Awake, REM, Core, Deep) with animated bar graphs
Personal sleep analytics and trend tracking
Fitness and biometric data presentation interfaces
ai_summary: A sleep tracking card component that displays comprehensive sleep metrics including time slept, quality score, and change percentage. Features an animated bar graph visualization showing different sleep stages (Awake, REM, Core, Deep) with color-coded segments and spring-based entrance animations. Built with Framer Motion for smooth stagger animations and uses a clean minimalist card design with Tailwind CSS styling, making it ideal for healthcare, wellness, and fitness tracking applications.
